DISCOVERY 302, THE PARTIES STIPULATED TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF L & C INVESTMENT GROUP'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION ON APRIL 8 , 2015 AT 10:00 A.M. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS UNDER CCP SECTION 2025.450(C)(1) IS DENIED, AS THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PARTIES WERE ENGAGED IN GOOD FAITH EFFORTS TO SCHEDULE THE DEPOSITIONS, BUT PLAINTIFF FILED THE INSTANT MOTION BEFORE THAT PROCESS COMPLETED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
